carousels.caption:
Save this Google Ads audit checklist ↓
Most business owners never check their search terms report — and waste 25% of their budget on searches that never convert. This 5-minute audit saved a café €300/month. #googleads #smallbusiness #ppcaudit #marketingtips
carousels.hook: Monday morning, my spend was normal—my pipeline wasn’t

carousels.caption:
Save this Meta Ads refresh guide ↓
Ad fatigue kicks in after 3-5 days — CTR drops 40% by day 7. A gym cut cost-per-lead by 35% just by refreshing creative every 5 days. #metaads #instagramads #smallbusiness #marketingtips
carousels.hook: Your ad’s CTR drops 40% by day 7—Meta won’t tell you

carousels.caption:
Steal this post-visit email sequence ↓
Most restaurants never send a follow-up after a visit — missing out on 20% more bookings. A pizzeria added €2k/month just by sending a 'Thanks for coming' email with a 10% discount. #emailmarketing #smallbusiness #restaurantmarketing #marketingtips
carousels.hook: The email that books 20% more tables—most restaurants skip it

carousels.caption:
Broad match vs phrase match: which wins? ↓
Broad match wastes 30% of your budget on unrelated searches. Phrase match cuts waste while keeping reach. A dentist saved €500/month just by switching. #googleads #ppc #smallbusiness #marketingtips
carousels.hook: 30% of your budget burns on broad match—here’s the fix

carousels.caption:
Save this lookalike audience guide ↓
Most business owners give up on lookalike audiences too soon — they need 7-14 days to learn. A boutique saw 40% lower CPA just by waiting 10 days before judging. #metaads #instagramads #smallbusiness #marketingtips
carousels.hook: Your lookalike audience needs 10 days—you gave it 3
